The constituency, encompassing Siliguri city and its suburbs, saw a voter turnout of 77% in 2021, with Sankar Ghosh of the BJP defeating Omprakash Mishra. In 2016, Asok Bhattacharya of the CPI(M) won with an 81% turnout.

articles.title: Trump’s PAINFUL SHOCK To Americans, US Gas Prices Hit RECORD As Iran War Explodes
articles.description: US fuel prices have surged to record levels, intensifying economic pressure on American households amid the ongoing Iran conflict. According to market data, gasoline prices have climbed sharply, with the national average hitting historic highs as global supply chains face disruption. Analysts link the spike to instability in key oil routes and rising geopolitical tensions. With prices still rising and uncertainty over energy markets, concerns are growing about further economic strain in the weeks ahead.
